data.content: Implementation already on main (commits 2d4b8fc379ee, 9c9340b340d6). Data derivations complete: applyFilters with last24h preset support (timestamp-aware filtering, preset precedence over manual dates), buildCombinedSeries for all-steps aggregation, buildLeaderboard with margin calculations and tiebreaker logic. All tests pass (2237/2237). TypeScript clean.
